scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 488 Not Acceptable Here [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK Via: [$inv_Via] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=2 [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 2 INVITE Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=sbc-uk-bs07a 319157248 1564513211 IN IP4 147.152.22.181 s=sip call c=IN IP4 147.152.22.180 t=0 0 m=audio 44864 RTP/AVP 18 101 a=rtpmap:18 G729/8000 a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=sendrecv a=ptime:20
